<!--
Thanks for the PR. A few quick things will help us merge faster.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One paragraph. What did you add, fix, or remove? -->

## Why?

<!-- What's the problem this solves? Link to an issue if there is one. -->

## What kind of change is this?

- [ ] New thinking skill
- [ ] New action skill
- [ ] New configuration skill
- [ ] New hook provider
- [ ] Tweak to an existing skill
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Spec change (please discuss in an issue first)
- [ ] Other

## How did you test it?

<!-- For new skills: did you run it end-to-end? Did you verify it composes with other skills? Did you check that the decision pages render? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My change follows the patterns of existing skills
- [ ] I've tested the change end-to-end (if applicable)
- [ ] I've updated the README if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I agree to license my contribution under [Apache 2.0](../LICENSE)
